user.title: Set up Monobank
user.description: Enter your Monobank API token. You can get it from https://api.monobank.ua/

error.invalid_auth: Invalid API token. Please check your token and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Monobank API. Please try again later.
error.unknown: Unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

abort.already_configured: This Monobank account is already configured.
